zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton於1483年出生在英國爾哈頓時，他的父親Sir Peter Piers Dutton III18歲，母親Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton29歲。他於1500年與Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall在英國德比夏爾結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和5個女兒的父母。他去世於1545年8月17日在英國爾格亞特 布德沃斯享年62歲，埋葬在英國爾格亞特 布德沃斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton于1483年出生在英国爾哈頓时，他的父亲Sir Peter Piers Dutton III18岁，母亲Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton29岁。他于1500年与Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall在英国德比夏爾结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和5个女儿的父母。他去世于1545年8月17日在英国爾格亞特 布德沃斯享年62岁，埋葬在英国爾格亞特 布德沃斯。

nameMeanings.name: Dutton
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (Cheshire, Lancashire, and Staffordshire): habitational name from either Dutton in Cheshire or Dutton in Lancashire. The first is named from Old English dūn ‘hill’ + tūn ‘enclosure, settlement’; the second from the Old English personal name Dudd(a) (see Dodd 1) + Old English tūn.

variants.name: Dodd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Dodd(e), Dudd(e), Old English Dodd(a), Dudd(a), a name of uncertain origin which remained in fairly widespread and frequent use from Lincolnshire to Devon and from Essex to Lancashire in England until the 14th century.

English: nickname from Middle English dod, a word of uncertain meaning, possibly a ‘lumpish, thickset person’ (compare modern English dialect dod ‘bunch or heap’), or by extension a ‘foolish person’ (compare Middle English dode-mused ‘stupid’), or perhaps a derivative of dodden ‘to shave (the head), to trim (hair)’, hence ‘the hairless or close-cropped one’.

English: possibly a modern variant of Daud or Dowd, the former arising from the Middle English personal name Daud(e), an extended form of Daw , and the latter from the Middle English personal name Doude, perhaps a side-form of either Dodde or of Daude, a pet form of Ralph .

nameMeanings.name: Peter
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name of the best-known of all Christ's apostles, traditionally regarded as the founder of the Christian Church. The name derives, via Latin, from Greek petros ‘stone, rock’. This is used as a translation of the Aramaic byname Cephas, given to the apostle Simon son of Jona, to distinguish him from another of the same name ( Simon Zelotes ). ‘When Jesus beheld him, he said, Thou art Simon the son of Jona: thou shalt be called Cephas, which is by interpretation, A stone’ (John 1:42). According to Matthew 16:17–18, Christ says more explicitly, ‘Blessed art thou, Simon Bar-jona … thou art Peter, and upon this rock I will build my church’. The name has been in continuous use since the Middle Ages.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton was born in 1483, in Hatton, Cheshire, England, his father, Sir Peter Piers Dutton III, was 18 and his mother, Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton, was 29. He married Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall in 1500, in Derbyshire, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 5 daughters. He died on 17 August 1545, in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England, at the age of 62, and was buried in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton est né en 1483, à Hatton, Cheshire, Angleterre, son père, Sir Peter Piers Dutton III, avait 18 ans et sa mère, Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall en 1500, à Derbyshire, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 5 filles. Il est décédé le 17 août 1545, à Great Budworth, Cheshire, Angleterre, à l’âge de 62 ans, et a été enterré à Great Budworth, Cheshire, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton 1483 in Hatton, Cheshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Sir Peter Piers Dutton III 18 und seine Mutter Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton 29. Er hat 1500 in Derbyshire, England Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 5 Töchter. Er starb am 17. August 1545 im Alter von 62 Jahren in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England und wurde in Great Budworth, Cheshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton è nato il nel 1483 nel Hatton, Cheshire, England, il suo padre, Sir Peter Piers Dutton III, aveva 18 anni e il suo madre, Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall nel 1500, nel Derbyshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 5 figlie. Morì il 17 agosto 1545, nel Great Budworth, Cheshire, England, all'età di 62 anni, e fu sepolto a Great Budworth, Cheshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Duttonが1483年にイギリスチェシュアイアハットオンで生まれた時，父Sir Peter Piers Dutton IIIは18歳，母Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hattonは29歳であった。1500年にイギリスデルブイシュアイアでLady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hallと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と5人の娘の親であった。彼は1545年8月17日にイギリスチェシュアイアグレアト ブドウオルスで62歳で死去し，イギリスチェシュアイアグレアト ブドウオルスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton(이)가 1483년 영국 체실르 해턴에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Sir Peter Piers Dutton III(은)는 18세였고, 그의 어머니 Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton(은)는 29세였다. 그는 1500년 영국 더비실르에서 Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 다섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1545년 8월 17일 영국 체실르 그리트 버드워스에서 62세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 체실르 그리트 버드워스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton nasceu em 1483, em Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir Peter Piers Dutton III, tinha 18 anos e sua mãe, Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall em 1500, em Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 5 filhas. Ele faleceu em 17 de agosto de 1545, em Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, com 62 anos, e foi sepultado em Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton родился в 1483 г. в местности хаттон, чешир, Англия, его отцу по имени Sir Peter Piers Dutton III было 18 лет, а матери, которую звали Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall в 1500 г. в местности дирбишир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 5 дочерей. Он умер 17 августа 1545 г. в местности грит будворт, чешир, Англия в возрасте 62 лет и был похоронен в местности грит будворт, чешир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Sir Peter Dutton Lord of Hatton and 18th Lord of Dutton nació en 1483, en Hatton, Cheshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir Peter Piers Dutton III, tenía 18 años y su mamá, Elisabeth Fouleshurst Baroness of Hatton, tenía 29 años. Se casó con Lady Eleanor Leigh of Adlington Hall en 1500, en Derbyshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 5 hijas. Murió el 17 de agosto de 1545, en Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra, a la edad de 62 años, y fue sepultado en Great Budworth, Cheshire, Inglaterra.
